articles.title: Newly discovered PamStealer isn't your typical macOS malware
articles.content: The discovery underscores the increased effort being poured into Mac infostealers.
articles.titleZh: 新发现的PamStealer不是典型的macOS恶意软件
articles.contentZh: 这一发现凸显了加大对Mac信息窃取者的投入。

articles.title: T-Mobile moving tens of thousands of virtual machines off VMware amid lawsuit
articles.content: T-Mobile wants Broadcom to keep supporting its VMware perpetual licenses.
articles.titleZh: T-Mobile在诉讼中将数万台虚拟机从VMware中移除
articles.contentZh: T-Mobile希望Broadcom继续支持其VMware永久许可证。

articles.title: New attack provides one more reason why AI browsers are a bad idea
articles.content: Telling an LLM that 2 + 2 = 5 is enough to make it follow forbidden instructions.
articles.titleZh: 新攻击为人工智能浏览器是一个坏主意提供了另一个原因
articles.contentZh: 告诉LLM 2 + 2 = 5足以使其遵循禁止的指示。

articles.title: US offers $10 million for info on group behind Signal and WhatsApp hacking spree
articles.content: Operation by two Russia-state groups has been ongoing since at least March.
articles.titleZh: 美国提供1000万美元用于获取Signal和WhatsApp黑客狂欢背后的团队信息
articles.contentZh: 至少自3月以来，两个俄罗斯国家集团的行动一直在进行。

articles.title: Hoto’s PixelDrive screwdriver is down to $60, matching its best price
articles.content: If your Prime Day purchases included a new desk, TV stand, bookshelf, or other furniture you still haven’t assembled, Hoto’s PixelDrive cordless screwdriver can help speed up the process. It’s currently on sale for $59.99 ($20 off) at Amazon, matching its best price to date.  From tightening loose screws on furniture to repairing electronics, the […]
articles.titleZh: Hoto的PixelDrive螺丝刀降至60 $ ，与其最优惠的价格相匹配
articles.contentZh: 如果您的Prime Day购物包括新书桌、电视架、书架或其他您尚未组装的家具， Hoto的PixelDrive无绳螺丝刀可以帮助加快这一过程。它目前在亚马逊以59.99 $ （折扣20 $ ）的价格出售，与迄今为止的最佳价格相匹配。从拧紧家具上的松动螺钉到维修电子产品， […]

articles.title: America’s greatest idea is still under threat
articles.content: The United States of America recently turned 250 years old. What a spectacle! The fireworks were amazing, and millions of proud people celebrated across the nation - even around the world. France lit up the Eiffel Tower; Japan had fireworks. French fighter jets flew above New York City with trails of red, white, and blue […]
articles.titleZh: 美国最伟大的思想仍然受到威胁
articles.contentZh: 美利坚合众国最近已经250岁了。真是一场奇观！烟花令人惊叹，数百万自豪的人在全国各地庆祝，甚至是世界各地。法国点亮了埃菲尔铁塔；日本有烟花。法国战斗机在纽约市上空飞行，有红色、白色和蓝色的痕迹[…]
